name: GEO Belt
description: The geostationary ring. At exactly 35,786 km, orbital period equals Earth's rotation — satellites appear fixed in the sky. GOES weather satellites, Meteosat, thousands of communications satellites. The specific altitude where physics and utility perfectly align.
scale_fact: 35,786 km is not a round number by design — it's the exact altitude where gravity and orbital speed balance to give a 24-hour period. Physics chose it.
